query:
SELECT p.id as product_id, p.sku, p.name, COUNT(pb.id) as batch_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_batches pb ON p.id = pb.productId
GROUP BY p.id
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT p.id as product_id, p.sku, p.name, COUNT(pb.id) as batch_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_batches pb ON p.id = pb.productId
GROUP BY p.id
LIMIT 5;
